task: Safe-additive Block 1 (C-1) — Dispatch Planners split control. The 'Planning' parent was an intentional click-to-toggle dropdown (locked decision #728), not a dead handler. Per Jorge's C-1 decision: split the parent — the LABEL becomes a <Link> navigating to /dispatch/planners/loads; the CHEVRON stays the click-toggle that opens the persistent submenu. Both coexist; #728 preserved. Added .nav-split CSS so label+chevron read as one item; mirror existing styling, no redesign. Updated DispatchSubnav.planners.test.tsx to assert BOTH (label has href, chevron toggles) — extended the #728 assertion, did not delete it. Other dropdown parents (Settlements/Documents, no href) unchanged. Frontend-only, additive, no money path, no migration. Tracker also marks the safe-additive queue + recon DONE-confirmations.
